hero.title: Best Sri Lankan Gem Stones
hero.subtitle: Direct-from-mine Sri Lankan gemstones including premium sapphires, rubies, and rare collector stones.
hero.description: Discover the finest Sri Lankan gem stones directly from the mines of Rathnapura, Sri Lanka's legendary gem capital.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Kamara Selections was founded by two friends: Ralph from Switzerland and Kamal from Sri Lanka. Friends for over 44 years, they built this gem business with mining partners in Rathnapura, known as the City of Gems. Their long-standing partnership and hands-on expertise help us deliver some of the best Sri Lankan gemstones with trusted sourcing.
about.heritageDesc: Built by two friends with 40+ years of trust
about.qualityDesc: Hand-selected gems from our own mines

gemstones.title: Our Gemstones
gemstones.subtitle: Explore our curated collection of the best Sri Lankan gemstones for fine jewelry and collectors.

sapphire.name: Blue Sapphire
sapphire.description: Ceylon blue sapphires are world-renowned for their exceptional color and clarity

ruby.name: Ruby
ruby.description: Rare and precious rubies with deep red hues from the heart of Sri Lanka

moonstone.name: Moonstone
moonstone.description: Milky adularescent moonstones with a soft blue sheen from Sri Lanka

topaz.name: Yellow Topaz
topaz.description: Stunning yellow topaz gemstones with golden brilliance

catseye.name: Cat's Eye
catseye.description: Rare chrysoberyl cat's eye with distinctive chatoyancy effect

alexandrite.name: Alexandrite
alexandrite.description: Extraordinary color-changing alexandrite, one of nature's rarest gems

footer.blurb: Trusted sourcing directly from Rathnapura mines with full transparency, consistency, and concierge-level service.
